common.not_found_desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved. Perhaps it's in another book.

landing.meta_title: read-pal — AI Reading Companion | Read Smarter, Remember More
landing.meta_description: Meet your AI reading friend. Upload any EPUB and read alongside an intelligent companion who explains concepts, asks questions, and helps you remember every insight. Free to start.
landing.og_title: read-pal — A Friend Who Reads With You
landing.og_description: Upload any book and read alongside an AI friend who asks thoughtful questions, explains tricky parts, and celebrates insights with you.
landing.hero_subtitle: Your reading companion, always by your side. Ask questions, explore ideas, and remember every insight — like having a thoughtful friend who's read every book you love.
landing.how_subtitle: Three simple steps to start reading with your new companion.
landing.step1_desc: Add an EPUB to your library and your companion gets to know it instantly.
landing.step2_desc: Your companion asks thoughtful questions, explains tricky parts, and celebrates insights with you.
landing.step3_desc: Ideas connect across books naturally, building a knowledge network that grows with every page.
landing.reading_better_subtitle: Highlight a passage and ask "why does this matter?" Get an instant answer in context. No tabs, no searching, no losing your place.
landing.exp1_desc: Select any text and ask your friend about it. Get explanations that make sense in context.
landing.exp2_desc: Add notes and highlights. Your friend connects them across chapters and books automatically.
landing.exp3_desc: Your friend notices when something clicks and celebrates with you. Reading becomes a shared experience.
landing.personas_subtitle: Pick a companion who gets you. Each one has their own style, and they all remember what you've read and talked about together.
landing.persona_sage_desc: Asks deep, philosophical questions that reveal hidden layers in the text.
landing.persona_penny_desc: Gets genuinely excited about ideas and makes connections to pop culture and everyday life.
landing.persona_alex_desc: Pushes your thinking by playing devil's advocate and questioning assumptions.
landing.persona_quinn_desc: Speaks only when it matters most. Concise, impactful insights.
landing.persona_sam_desc: Focused on real-world application. Helps you retain and use what you learn.
landing.everything_subtitle: Built for people who actually read, not just collect books.
landing.feat_reader_desc: EPUB reader with themes, fonts, and a reading experience designed for focus.
landing.feat_agents_desc: Companion, Research, Coach, Synthesis, and your personal Reading Friend.
landing.feat_highlights_desc: Highlight passages and add notes. AI connects ideas across all your books.
landing.feat_graph_desc: See how concepts connect across everything you've read, visualized beautifully.
landing.feat_streaks_desc: Track your daily reading habit. Streaks, stats, and activity heatmaps.
landing.feat_memory_desc: Beautiful compilations of your reading journeys with AI-extracted insights.
landing.built_for_title: Built for People Who Actually Read
landing.built_for_subtitle: Whether you're studying for exams, doing research, or just love books — read-pal adapts to you.
landing.student_desc: Ace your exams with AI-powered study sessions, spaced repetition flashcards, and a knowledge graph that connects course material across semesters.
landing.researcher_desc: Synthesize insights across papers, track citations, and export in academic formats. Your research companion that never forgets a connection.
landing.booklover_desc: Remember every insight from every book. Share beautiful reading cards, join book clubs, and build a personal library of ideas.
landing.oss_subtitle: read-pal is open source under the MIT license. Inspect the code, contribute features, or self-host on your own server. Built with transparency in mind.
landing.faq1_q: What is an AI reading companion?
landing.faq1_a: An AI reading companion is an intelligent assistant that reads alongside you. It explains concepts in context, asks thoughtful questions about what you're reading, highlights connections across books, and helps you remember key insights — like a friend who's always read the same book.
landing.faq2_q: How do I remember what I read?
landing.faq2_a: read-pal helps you retain more through active reading techniques: smart highlights with AI-powered notes, a personal knowledge graph that connects ideas across books, spaced repetition prompts from your reading friend, and beautiful memory books that compile your journey.
landing.faq3_a: Yes! read-pal has a free tier that lets you upload EPUB books, chat with your AI reading companion, create highlights and annotations, and track your reading streaks. No credit card required to get started.
landing.faq4_q: What book formats does read-pal support?
landing.faq4_a: read-pal currently supports EPUB files. Upload any EPUB and the AI companion instantly gets to know the content, ready to discuss, explain, and explore ideas with you. More formats are coming soon.
landing.faq5_q: How is read-pal different from Kindle or Readwise?
landing.faq5_a: Unlike passive e-readers (Kindle) or highlight collectors (Readwise), read-pal is an active reading partner. Its AI agents chat with you in real-time, explain passages in context, ask questions that deepen understanding, and build a knowledge graph connecting everything you've read.
landing.faq6_q: Can I share my book highlights?
landing.faq6_a: Yes! read-pal lets you turn your favorite passages into beautiful quote cards that you can share on social media. You can also export all your highlights and annotations as Markdown or JSON.
landing.cta_join_title: Join the Beta — Shape the Future of Reading
landing.cta_join_subtitle: We're looking for avid readers to try read-pal and tell us what they think. Your feedback shapes every feature we build.
landing.free_during_beta: Free during beta. No credit card required.
landing.features_title: Everything you need to read smarter
landing.features_subtitle: read-pal transforms passive reading into active learning with AI companions that engage, explain, and connect ideas.
landing.feature1_desc: Chat with an AI friend who understands your book, explains difficult passages, and asks thought-provoking questions.
landing.feature2_desc: Ideas from different books connect automatically. See how everything relates in an interactive visualization.
landing.feature3_desc: Beautiful compilations of your reading journey — highlights, notes, AI conversations, and insights woven into a personal document.
landing.feature4_desc: SM-2 flashcards generated from your highlights. Review at the right time to remember everything.
landing.feature5_desc: Choose a companion that matches your style — wise, enthusiastic, challenging, quiet, or practical.
landing.feature6_desc: Export in APA,MLA, Chicago, Markdown, JSON, and more. Your data, your format.
landing.oss_deploy_desc: Docker Compose with 5 containers. Up and running in minutes.
landing.oss_export_desc: Export highlights, notes, and AI conversations in any format. No lock-in.
landing.oss_privacy_desc: Self-host on your own server. Your reading data never leaves your control.
landing.cta_bottom_subtitle: Join thousands of readers who learn more from every book.
landing.footer_description: An open-source AI reading companion that helps you understand, remember, and connect ideas from every book you read.

docs.meta_description: Learn how to use read-pal: upload books, read with AI companions, create annotations, and build your knowledge graph.
docs.header_subtitle: Everything you need to get the most out of read-pal — from uploading your first book to building integrations with our API.
docs.cta_subtitle: Create a free account and upload your first book in under 60 seconds.
docs.getting_started_create_account_content: Sign up for free at read-pal. No credit card required. You'll get immediate access to all beta features including the AI reading companion, knowledge graph, and flashcards.
docs.getting_started_upload_content: Click "Upload" in your library and select an EPUB file. read-pal processes it instantly — extracting chapters, building a table of contents, and preparing the AI companion to discuss the content with you.
docs.getting_started_start_reading_content: Open the book and start reading. The reader supports customizable fonts, themes, and a distraction-free mode. Use keyboard shortcuts (arrow keys) to navigate between chapters.
docs.getting_started_meet_companion_content: Click the chat icon to open your AI reading companion. Ask questions about the current passage, request explanations, or discuss themes. The companion knows the full book content.
docs.reading_highlights_content: Select any text to highlight it. Add notes to captures your thoughts. All annotations are searchable and feed into the AI companion's context and your knowledge graph.
docs.reading_bookmarks_content: Bookmark key passages for quick access. Bookmarks appear in the chapter outline and can be browsed from the annotation sidebar.
docs.reading_streaks_content: read-pal tracks your daily reading habit. Build streaks, see your reading calendar heatmap, and track your reading speed over time.
docs.reading_study_mode_content: Toggle study mode for focused reading sessions. Get AI-generated objectives, concept checks, and mastery tracking. Perfect for academic reading.
docs.ai_companion_content: Your book-aware AI assistant that can explain passages, generate summaries, answer questions, and suggest discussion topics. Streams responses in real-time via SSE.
docs.ai_friends_content: Choose from 5 distinct AI personas: Sage (wise & patient), Penny (enthusiastic), Alex (challenger), Quinn (quiet companion), or Sam (study buddy). Each has their own style and personality.
docs.ai_knowledge_graph_content: As you read and annotate, read-pal automatically builds a knowledge graph connecting concepts across all your books. Visualize relationships and discover unexpected connections.
docs.ai_synthesis_content: The synthesis engine analyzes your highlights, notes, and AI conversations across multiple books to find thematic connections and generate integrated insights.
docs.learning_flashcards_content: read-pal uses the SM-2 algorithm (same as Anki) to schedule flashcard reviews at optimal intervals. Flashcards are generated from your highlights and notes.
docs.learning_memory_books_content: When you finish a book, read-pal generates a beautiful 6-chapter Memory Book: Cover, Reading Journey, Highlights, Notes, Conversations, and Looking Forward.
docs.learning_interventions_content: The AI monitors your reading patterns and provides timely interventions: marathon reading alerts, low-engagement nudges, and welcome-back messages.
docs.social_book_clubs_content: Create or join book clubs. Share reading progress, discuss chapters, and compare notes with other readers.
docs.social_reading_cards_content: Turn your favorite passages into beautiful shareable cards. Perfect for social media, study groups, or personal collections.
docs.social_export_content: Export your annotations and data in multiple formats: CSV, Markdown, HTML, APA 7th, MLA 9th, Chicago, and Zotero RIS. Ideal for research and academic work.
docs.dev_rest_api_content: Full REST API with 140+ endpoints. Includes OpenAPI/Swagger documentation, API key management, and comprehensive endpoint reference.
docs.dev_webhooks_content: Subscribe to real-time events like book.completed, annotation.created, and session.ended. HMAC-SHA256 signed payloads with automatic retry.
docs.dev_api_keys_content: Create up to 5 personal access tokens (rpk_ prefix) for scripts, integrations, and automation. Keys are SHA-256 hashed on the server.

developers.header_subtitle: Build integrations, automate workflows, and analyze your reading data programmatically.
developers.step1_desc: Go to {link} to create a personal access token. Keys use the {code} prefix and are SHA-256 hashed on the server.
developers.auth_intro: All authenticated endpoints require an {code} header.
developers.auth_tip: Tip: Use API keys for scripts and integrations. They never expire but can be revoked anytime. Max 5 per user.
developers.response_intro: All API responses use a consistent envelope:
developers.response_pagination: Paginated list endpoints include {code} in the response with {code2}, {code3}, {code4}, and {code5}.
developers.webhooks_intro: Get real-time HTTP callbacks when events happen in your reading activity. Webhooks are delivered via {code} with HMAC-SHA256 signatures.
developers.webhooks_create_comment: # Create a webhook for book and session events
developers.webhooks_secret_note: The response includes the {code} — save it, it's only shown once. Max 10 webhooks per user.
developers.webhooks_verify_desc: Verify by computing {code} and comparing to the signature header.
developers.webhooks_test_comment: # Send a test ping to your webhook
developers.webhooks_retry_policy: Retry policy: Failed deliveries (non-2xx or timeout) increment a failure counter. After 10 consecutive failures, the webhook is automatically disabled. Test pings reset the counter on success.
developers.api_key_active: You have an active API key: {code}.
